products.name: Infer
products.tagline: Schema inference, validation & type generation for agents.
products.description: POST any JSON and get back a JSON Schema, TypeScript type, Zod schema, or OpenAPI component. Agents use Infer to understand unknown data, validate tool outputs, and generate typed interfaces on the fly.

examples.python:
import requests
res = requests.post('https://neverparse.com/api/v1/infer/detect',
  json={'data': {'name': 'Alice', 'age': 30, 'active': True}})
schema = res.json()['schema']

products.name: ErrorMap
products.tagline: Normalize any API error into RFC 9457 Problem Details with agent-ready classification.
products.description: POST any API error response — JSON, HTML, plain text — and get back a consistent RFC 9457 Problem Details object with error classification, retryability, and suggested recovery actions. Agents use ErrorMap to handle failures from any API without custom error parsers.

endpoints.description: Parse any raw error into structured Problem Details with classification
Normalize a JSON error object to RFC 9457 format
Classify an error by category with retry guidance

examples.python:
import requests
res = requests.post('https://neverparse.com/api/v1/errormap/parse',
  json={'raw': {'error': {'code': 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED', 'message': 'Too many requests'}}, 'statusCode': 429, 'headers': {'Retry-After': '30'}})
problem = res.json()['problem']
if problem['retryable']: time.sleep(problem['retryAfterMs'] / 1000)

products.name: ToolBridge
products.tagline: Universal tool definition converter for multi-provider agents.
products.description: Convert tool definitions between OpenAI function calling, Anthropic tool use, MCP tool schema, and JSON Schema formats. Agents use ToolBridge to work across providers without manual format translation.

endpoints.description: Convert a tool definition between formats
Auto-detect the format of a tool definition
Convert up to 100 tool definitions at once

examples.python:
import requests
res = requests.post('https://neverparse.com/api/v1/toolbridge/convert',
  json={'tool': {'type': 'function', 'function': {'name': 'get_weather', 'description': 'Get weather', 'parameters': {'type': 'object', 'properties': {'location': {'type': 'string'}}, 'required': ['location']}}}, 'from': 'openai', 'to': 'anthropic'})
result = res.json()['result']
